subject: Update on your Staffly application
body:
Hi Amina,

Thank you for your interest in Staffly. After careful review, we are unable to approve access at this time.

You are welcome to apply again in the future.

— Staffly Team
html:
Application update

Hi Amina, thank you for your interest. We are unable to approve access at this time.
